COURSE WORKBOOK
with Gretta Van Riel, Rob Ward, Chase Dimond
Richard Li, Nick Shackelford
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 4 --

In this lesson, I’ll show you how to create invaluable
customer surveys. The data you gather here will be
the lifeblood of your brand’s success. So it’s important
to tailor your marketing and product/s to the biggest
majority of your customers.
Self-Assessment Questions for Creating a Survey
• 	What is it that we don’t know about our customers?
• 	What assumptions have we been making until now?
• 	What’s an unbiased way we can ask our customers
questions?
• 	How can we get usable information that will
improve our marketing?
Survey Tips
• 	Don’t offer a reward or prize
• 	Set time expectations for completion
• 	Aim for good, clean data
• 	Send the survey at most once a year
ACTION ITEMS
❏ 	Draft a list of questions in the space provided in
the workbook.
❏ 	Send out your survey using Typeform, Survey
Monkey or Google Forms.
“The closer you can get to telling your customer what
they want to hear, the cheaper you can acquire that
customer.”
